tasks.label: Package
args: Remove-Item -Force '${workspaceFolder}\com.mhwlng.elite.streamDeckPlugin' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::CreateFromDirectory('${workspaceFolder}\Elite\bin\Debug', '${workspaceFolder}\com.mhwlng.elite.tmp.zip'); Rename-Item '${workspaceFolder}\com.mhwlng.elite.tmp.zip' '${workspaceFolder}\com.mhwlng.elite.streamDeckPlugin'; Write-Host 'Package created successfully.'
